package.name: m_ahe_evaluation
package.description: Evaluation and CSV logging for AHE-MRTA experiments. Implements event-based CSV logging (task_events, allocation_events, ecosystem_metrics), low-frequency sampled robot_state_timeseries (1-2 Hz, configurable), buffered CSV writing, experiment metadata generation, and post-run consolidation scripts. Plots are generated ONLY after simulation runs complete. No plotting during simulation. CSV files are the primary data source; rosbags are optional.
